post.title: Why Technology Still Needs Humanity
post.intent_statement: Explore whether technology can amplify human judgment without replacing agency.
post.central_question: Can a tool extend human judgment without quietly replacing it?
post.core_insight: Technology becomes meaningful when joined to context, judgment, and care.
post.body_html:
Technology alone is not enough. The question is whether tools can amplify human judgment without replacing it.

A good tool does not erase the human. It gives the human a clearer surface for choice — more signal, less noise, and a shorter path between intent and action.

The failure mode is automation that hides its reasoning. When a system decides without showing why, it does not extend judgment; it quietly substitutes for it.
